Darius_vs_Garen_TOP.tip: Darius's passive excels in extended trades, which Garen typically wants to avoid. If Garen activates Q (Decisive Strike) and runs at you, either kite back and land your Q (Decimate) during his silence or immediately after, or tank the Q and punish with W and auto-attacks, then Q. Save your E (Apprehend) to pull Garen back if he tries to run away after a short trade with his Q's movement speed. Garen's E (Judgment) can be deadly; consider waiting for it to end or kiting around its edge while he spins to land your Q sweet spot. If Garen uses W (Courage) early in a trade, his sustained damage reduction is gone, making him vulnerable to your full passive stack burst.
Darius_vs_Garen_TOP.earlyGame: Even to Darius favored, Garen can disengage Darius.

Darius_vs_Shen_TOP.tip: Punish Shen's Q (Twilight Assault) cooldown. If Shen uses Q to farm or poke without his empowered autos available, engage him immediately with W and auto attacks. His W (Spirit's Refuge) can block your auto attacks and W; try to bait it out by walking up and then disengaging slightly, or engage after it's used. Save your E (Apprehend) to pull him back if he tries to dash away with E (Shadow Dash) or to interrupt his empowered Q auto attacks. Be mindful of Shen's R (Stand United) and try to push your advantage before he can ult away, or roam with your Ghost/Flash advantage.
Darius_vs_Shen_TOP.earlyGame: Darius wins extended trades due to passive.

Garen_vs_Darius_TOP.tip: Engage Darius with Q (Decisive Strike) to silence and get an empowered auto, then immediately activate E (Judgment) and spin on him for a short trade. Use W (Courage) to mitigate Darius's initial Q (Decimate) damage or when he's building passive stacks. Avoid extended trades at all costs, as Darius will stack Hemorrhage and out-damage you rapidly. Your Q's movement speed boost is essential for disengaging after a quick trade before he can stack his passive. If Darius pulls you with E (Apprehend), activate W to reduce his burst and try to escape with Q if his pull is on cooldown. Recognize his Q outer edge damage and try to stay inside if you must take damage, or completely out of range.

Garen_vs_Shen_TOP.tip: Garen has a tough time against Shen's W (Spirit's Refuge) blocking his main damage sources. Try to bait out Shen's W by walking up menacingly or using Q without E before committing to your full combo with Q (Decisive Strike) and E (Judgment). If Shen uses W, wait for it to expire, then engage. Your Q silence can prevent Shen from casting E (Shadow Dash) or W if timed perfectly, but his passive shield will still activate. Be mindful of Shen's Q (Twilight Assault) poke and try to avoid his empowered autos by staying out of his spirit blade path. When Shen pushes with his empowered Q, look for an opportunity to trade back. If Shen tries to taunt you with E, use your Q to cleanse the slow and then silence him if he's in range, or run away if not favorable.
Garen_vs_Shen_TOP.earlyGame: Garen can burst, Shen has sustain.

Shen_vs_Darius_TOP.tip: Use your Q (Twilight Assault) empowered autos to trade with Darius, but strictly avoid extended trades where his Hemorrhage passive can stack. Your W (Spirit's Refuge) is critical for blocking Darius's auto attacks and W reset; save it for when he engages or when he has a few passive stacks. If Darius pulls you with E (Apprehend), immediately activate W and position yourself to taunt him with E (Shadow Dash) towards your tower or away from his minion wave. Darius is very susceptible to ganks without Flash; communicate with your jungler and use your E to set up the gank and peel him from your jungler's damage.

Shen_vs_Garen_TOP.tip: Use your Q (Twilight Assault) empowered autos to poke Garen and grab your spirit blade through him for sustained damage, capitalizing on his lack of ranged abilities. Shen's W (Spirit's Refuge) is incredibly effective against Garen's Q (Decisive Strike) empowered auto attack and E (Judgment) spin; save your W for when Garen commits to an engage to negate his primary damage. Your E (Shadow Dash) can be used defensively to escape Garen's Q engage or offensively to taunt him into a gank, ensuring he can't flee with his Q speed boost. Garen's passive regeneration is annoying; try to force frequent short trades to deny him health regeneration. Be cautious of Garen's ultimate (Demacian Justice) when you are low on health, as your shield might not be enough.
